The user wants to order a group by age, but no ages or relations are supplied.
The `logic_ordering` tool requires relations (e.g., "greater_than", "less_than") and names (ages) to perform an ordering. Since no ages or relations are provided, the task is ambiguous and unsupported by the available tools.

I must select exactly one supported tool only when every argument is explicit. Since the arguments are not explicit, I must return `none`.
